## What does this PR do?

<!-- Describe your changes -->

## Type of change

- [ ] Add new resource (paper or tool)
- [ ] Update existing entry (metrics, description, links)
- [ ] Fix error (broken link, incorrect data)
- [ ] Improve documentation
- [ ] Other (describe below)

## For new resources

**Resource name**:
**Stage**: (Survey / Ideation / Experiment / Analysis / Writing / Promotion)
**Autonomy Level**: (L1 / L2 / L3 / L4 / L5)

## Checklist

- [ ] I have read [CONTRIBUTING.md](CONTRIBUTING.md)
- [ ] The resource is not already listed
- [ ] Description is concise and factual (no marketing language)
- [ ] Quantitative metrics included where available
- [ ] Classification follows the decision tree in CONTRIBUTING.md
- [ ] Links are working
- [ ] Entry follows the formatting standards (see existing entries)
- [ ] Alphabetical order maintained within subsection
